message:
test(e2e): add agent loop + cross-provider parity suites and expand live E2E coverage

New test files:
- tests/e2e_agent_loop.rs (bd-2q00): Full agent loop integration tests
  running real AgentSession + ToolRegistry with deterministic in-process
  provider scripts. Covers SimpleConversation, ToolRoundTrip (file read
  with content verification), and MultiTool (write+read) scenarios.
  No network, no fixture playback, no mock HTTP.

- tests/e2e_cross_provider_parity.rs: Live cross-provider parity tests
  gated behind CI_E2E_TESTS=1. Validates that all 6 providers
  (Anthropic, OpenAI, Google, Cohere, xAI, DeepSeek) produce
  consistent streaming event sequences for identical prompts.
  Includes per-provider model fallback lists and timeout handling.

Expanded e2e_cli.rs:
- config subcommand now asserts Packages path and settings precedence
  lines (matching main.rs config output changes)

Expanded e2e_live.rs (~1200 line expansion):
- Streaming event sequence validation for all providers
- Tool use round-trip tests (bash, read, write tools)
- Thinking/reasoning content verification
- Cost tracking and usage metrics validation
- Multi-turn conversation continuity tests
- Error handling: invalid API keys, malformed requests
- Provider-specific edge cases (Cohere tool streaming, Gemini
  grounding, xAI streaming format)

Expanded e2e_live_harness.rs (~590 line expansion):
- LiveE2eRegistry with per-provider model configuration
- Shared test helpers: build_live_context, build_live_stream_options,
  create_live_provider, parse_http_status
- LIVE_E2E_TIMEOUT and LIVE_SHORT_PROMPT constants
- Structured assertion helpers for stream event validation

tests/common/logging.rs: rustfmt formatting for default_cost_thresholds
test and find_unredacted_keys_inner signature.

suite_classification.toml: add e2e_agent_loop to test suite registry.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
